text: It is not the most eye-catching and certainly not the most worked-out part of the coalition agreement. Even so, it is notable that the incoming cabinet says it will make agreements with business and government bodies on promoting working from home. The reason is easy to guess, as the plan sits under the subheading Climate and Energy. When more people work from home there are fewer journeys, which reduces greenhouse gas emissions. That is welcome, as emissions must fall sharply to prevent the Earth from warming by more than 1.5 degrees this century, with all the consequences that entails.

It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home.

text: The reason is easy to guess, as the plan sits under the subheading Climate and Energy. When more people work from home there are fewer journeys, which reduces greenhouse gas emissions. That is welcome, as emissions must fall sharply to prevent the Earth from warming by more than 1.5 degrees this century, with all the consequences that entails. It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home. Working from home has limits.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0010
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0011
text: When more people work from home there are fewer journeys, which reduces greenhouse gas emissions. That is welcome, as emissions must fall sharply to prevent the Earth from warming by more than 1.5 degrees this century, with all the consequences that entails. It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home. Working from home has limits. You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0011
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: That is welcome, as emissions must fall sharply to prevent the Earth from warming by more than 1.5 degrees this century, with all the consequences that entails. It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home. Working from home has limits. You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality. But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0012
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home. Working from home has limits. You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality. But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible. In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0013

text: Working from home has limits. You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality. But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible. In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO. A year earlier it was 37 per cent.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0014

text: You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality. But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible. In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO. A year earlier it was 37 per cent. Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0015
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible. In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO. A year earlier it was 37 per cent. Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions. If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0016
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO. A year earlier it was 37 per cent. Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions. If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft. Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0017
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: A year earlier it was 37 per cent. Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions. If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft. Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount. The saving equals 150,000 return flights between Amsterdam and New York, [according to environmental organisation Natuur & Milieu](https://www.natuurenmilieu.nl/nieuwsberichten/15-dag-thuiswerken-scheelt-nederlanders-3-miljard-kilometers-per-jaar/).

text: Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions. If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft. Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount. The saving equals 150,000 return flights between Amsterdam and New York, [according to environmental organisation Natuur & Milieu](https://www.natuurenmilieu.nl/nieuwsberichten/15-dag-thuiswerken-scheelt-nederlanders-3-miljard-kilometers-per-jaar/). Employers can kill two birds with one stone by promoting working from home.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0019

text: If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft. Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount. The saving equals 150,000 return flights between Amsterdam and New York, [according to environmental organisation Natuur & Milieu](https://www.natuurenmilieu.nl/nieuwsberichten/15-dag-thuiswerken-scheelt-nederlanders-3-miljard-kilometers-per-jaar/). Employers can kill two birds with one stone by promoting working from home. Besides cutting emissions, it can improve employees’ work-life balance.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0020

text: Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount. Employers can kill two birds with one stone by promoting working from home. Besides cutting emissions, it can improve employees’ work-life balance. Research for ABN AMRO’s Sectoral Well-being Monitor shows that employees see work-life balance, together with health, as the most important aspect of a job.

Employers can kill two birds with one stone by promoting working from home. Besides cutting emissions, it can improve employees’ work-life balance. Research for ABN AMRO’s Sectoral Well-being Monitor shows that employees see work-life balance, together with health, as the most important aspect of a job. These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”.

These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”. Even so, working from home has downsides.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0023

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0024
text: Besides cutting emissions, it can improve employees’ work-life balance. Research for ABN AMRO’s Sectoral Well-being Monitor shows that employees see work-life balance, together with health, as the most important aspect of a job. These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”. Even so, working from home has downsides. During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0024
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0025
text: Research for ABN AMRO’s Sectoral Well-being Monitor shows that employees see work-life balance, together with health, as the most important aspect of a job. These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”. Even so, working from home has downsides. During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness. We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0025
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0026
text: These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”. Even so, working from home has downsides. During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness. We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm. There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0026
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0027
text: Even so, working from home has downsides. During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness. We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm. There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration. These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0027
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0028
text: During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness. We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm. There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration. These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home. In addition, restricting or making work-related activities more expensive could further encourage working from home, such as the incoming cabinet’s proposed road pricing.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0028
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0029
text: We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm. There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration. These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home. In addition, restricting or making work-related activities more expensive could further encourage working from home, such as the incoming cabinet’s proposed road pricing. We should work with employers to find the right approach.

text: There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration. These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home. In addition, restricting or making work-related activities more expensive could further encourage working from home, such as the incoming cabinet’s proposed road pricing. We should work with employers to find the right approach. Some employers will certainly want to help think this through.

metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0031
text: These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home. In addition, restricting or making work-related activities more expensive could further encourage working from home, such as the incoming cabinet’s proposed road pricing. We should work with employers to find the right approach. Some employers will certainly want to help think this through. Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally.

We should work with employers to find the right approach. Some employers will certainly want to help think this through. Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally. It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps.

text: We should work with employers to find the right approach. Some employers will certainly want to help think this through. Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally. It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps. Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently.

text: Some employers will certainly want to help think this through. Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally. It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps. Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently. That momentum can fade quickly, as the jam-packed morning rush hour in early October 2021 showed.

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0035
text: Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally. It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps. Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently. That momentum can fade quickly, as the jam-packed morning rush hour in early October 2021 showed. The work-from-home guidance had barely been lifted when hundreds of kilometres of traffic jams filled the motorways.

text: It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps. Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently. That momentum can fade quickly, as the jam-packed morning rush hour in early October 2021 showed. The work-from-home guidance had barely been lifted when hundreds of kilometres of traffic jams filled the motorways. In Headlines & Insights, ABN AMRO explains the news.

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__c5-sentence-window__0037
text:
Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently. That momentum can fade quickly, as the jam-packed morning rush hour in early October 2021 showed. The work-from-home guidance had barely been lifted when hundreds of kilometres of traffic jams filled the motorways. In Headlines & Insights, ABN AMRO explains the news. More information
